title: Uranium+
body:
Uranium+ is a mod that adds uranium to minecraft

I would recommend installing.
 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

you can get it by finding ore, it is only found in the deepslate layer, it looks like this:
![Uranium Ore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08ef9e8f1bcbfee78792f0fb9307fc50fc70267f.png)

</details>



 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

 You can make tools with uranium, such as Uranium pickaxes. They are stronger than netherite & Have the speed of gold, they can be crafted with **Uranium, Uranium Scrap, Diamond tool**. They are crafted like this:
 ![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09ca3ea7bf40628ba9246fa02eec4ed049edbc1a.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Uranium Scraps are crafted with **Any Stone, Netherite Scraps, Uranium**. They are crafted like this:
![Uranium Scraps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d254ee0e92a842b2681c2652470b520bce32ab56.png)

</details>


I wont spoil too much, so you can find out the rest...

![...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20386242615443dbab3f49a152031ee795665f93.png)
